name: Tayuya
description: Tayuyas only weapon is a flute with which she can cast Genjutsu or control three summoned demons, The Doki.

skills.name: Doki Demons
skills.description: Tayuya summons the Doki Demons, dealing 15 piercing damage to all enemies for 2 turns. Tayuya gains 10 points of damage reduction for 2 turns. The following turn, 'Doki Ghosts' will be improved and will remove chakra from the enemy.

skills.name: Doki Ghosts
skills.description: Tayuya deals 15 affliction damage to one enemy. If used after 'Doki Demons', this skill will also remove 1 ninjutsu or genjutsu chakra. If used after 'Demonic Flute Illusion', this skill will also stun the enemy's physical and chakra skills for 1 turn.

skills.name: Demonic Flute Illusion
skills.description: Playing a genjutsu melody on her flute. For 1 turn, all enemies will have their harmful skills stunned. The following turn, 'Doki Ghosts' will be improved and will stun the enemy's physical and chakra skills for 1 turn. This skill cannot be countered.

skills.name: Tayuya Insight
skills.description: This skill makes Tayuya invulnerable for 1 turn.
